title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Flipkart Global Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Flipkart Global Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Flipkart Global Group, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Digital Marketing Manager for our Chandigarh operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Flipkart Global Group:
Flipkart Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Flipkart Global Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
